MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. TIMOTHY S. BROWN, ESQ. of Bauman Loewe Witt & Maxwell, P.L.L.C., Tel No. 480-502-4664 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature via e-mail at contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is denied without prejudice to being re-filed. The motion was filed with insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
